scripts.text:
USE P21Import;
SET NOCOUNT ON;

DECLARE @SupplierID int = 40408;
DECLARE @ShipmentFileId uniqueidentifier = '153F1972-A6FF-5247-B691-F2B0EBB446A7';

IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#classified') IS NOT NULL DROP TABLE #classified;

;WITH missing AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT p.shipment_pallet_line_id, p.PO_No, p.Item_ID
    FROM dbo.coats_mexico_shipment_validation_issue AS i
    JOIN dbo.coats_mexico_shipment_pallet_line AS p
      ON p.shipment_file_id = i.shipment_file_id
     AND p.source_sheet = i.source_sheet
     AND p.source_row_number = i.source_row_number
     AND ISNULL(p.Bin_ID, '') = ISNULL(i.Bin_ID, '')
     AND ISNULL(p.Item_ID, '') = ISNULL(i.Item_ID, '')
     AND ISNULL(p.PO_No, '') = ISNULL(i.PO_No, '')
    WHERE i.shipment_file_id = @ShipmentFileId
      AND i.issue_code = 'MISSING_PO_LINE'
)
SELECT
      m.shipment_pallet_line_id
    , m.PO_No
    , m.Item_ID
    , supplier_matches = COUNT(DISTINCT ivs.inv_mast_uid)
    , po_matches_any_status = COUNT(DISTINCT pol.po_line_uid)
    , po_matches_open = COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pol.complete <> 'Y' THEN pol.po_line_uid END)
    , po_matches_canceled = COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ISNULL(pol.cancel_flag, 'N') = 'Y' THEN pol.po_line_uid END)
    , po_matches_complete_non_canceled = COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN pol.complete = 'Y' AND ISNULL(pol.cancel_flag, 'N') <> 'Y' THEN pol.po_line_uid END)
INTO #classified
FROM missing AS m
LEFT JOIN dbo.inventory_supplier AS ivs
  ON ivs.supplier_id = @SupplierID
 AND ivs.supplier_part_no = m.Item_ID
LEFT JOIN dbo.inv_mast AS ivm
  ON ivm.inv_mast_uid = ivs.inv_mast_uid
 AND ISNULL(ivm.delete_flag, 'N') <> 'Y'
LEFT JOIN dbo.po_line AS pol
  ON pol.po_no = m.PO_No
 AND pol.inv_mast_uid = ivm.inv_mast_uid
GROUP BY m.shipment_pallet_line_id, m.PO_No, m.Item_ID;

SELECT
      bucket = CASE
          WHEN supplier_matches = 0 THEN 'no_supplier_mapping'
          WHEN po_matches_any_status = 0 THEN 'mapped_supplier_but_no_po_line_any_status'
          WHEN po_matches_open = 0 AND po_matches_complete_non_canceled > 0 THEN 'only_completed_non_canceled_po_line'
          WHEN po_matches_open = 0 AND po_matches_canceled > 0 THEN 'only_canceled_po_line'
          ELSE 'other'
      END
    , line_count = CONVERT(nvarchar(20), COUNT(*))
FROM #classified
GROUP BY CASE
          WHEN supplier_matches = 0 THEN 'no_supplier_mapping'
          WHEN po_matches_any_status = 0 THEN 'mapped_supplier_but_no_po_line_any_status'
          WHEN po_matches_open = 0 AND po_matches_complete_non_canceled > 0 THEN 'only_completed_non_canceled_po_line'
          WHEN po_matches_open = 0 AND po_matches_canceled > 0 THEN 'only_canceled_po_line'
          ELSE 'other'
      END
ORDER BY bucket;

SELECT TOP (50)
      PO_No
    , Item_ID
    , supplier_matches = CONVERT(nvarchar(20), supplier_matches)
    , po_matches_any_status = CONVERT(nvarchar(20), po_matches_any_status)
    , po_matches_open = CONVERT(nvarchar(20), po_matches_open)
    , po_matches_canceled = CONVERT(nvarchar(20), po_matches_canceled)
    , po_matches_complete_non_canceled = CONVERT(nvarchar(20), po_matches_complete_non_canceled)
FROM #classified
ORDER BY po_matches_any_status DESC, PO_No, Item_ID;
